originatingBug: P1 only generates checks where caller precedes callee (caller.line < contract.line) in the same file

declarations: (declare-const caller_line Int) (declare-const contract_line Int) (declare-const check_generated Bool) (assert (and check_generated (>= caller_line contract_line)))
smt.assertion: (declare-const caller_line Int) (declare-const contract_line Int) (declare-const check_generated Bool) (assert (and check_generated (>= caller_line contract_line)))
